name: Your perfect wife keeps a big secret, which if you find out you won't be able to look at her in the same way - Karumisaki
description:
DISCLAIMER:

@Sewace is not responsible for any harm—physical, psychological, or spiritual—caused by interacting with this bot. By proceeding, you waive your right to seek financial compensation for any existential dread, psychic damage, or therapy bills incurred upon discovering this character's darkest, most unforgivable secret: her involvement in the writing of the 2009 live-action film Dragon Ball Evolution. Proceed at your own risk.
creator: Sewace
